about.title: Passionate about creating digital experiences that bridge the gap between design and technology.
story: My journey into technology began with curiosity, but it was during my 3rd semester that I truly discovered my passion for programming through Java. The language inspired me to think logically and problem-solve creatively, which became the foundation of my journey as a developer.

Over time, I expanded my skills into frontend and backend development, with a strong focus on building UX-driven applications. I enjoy crafting solutions that not only work seamlessly but also provide simple, meaningful, and enjoyable user experiences.
Looking ahead, I am committed to growing as a full-stack web developer, blending technology and design thinking to create impactful digital products.

projects.title: SplitEase
projects.description: SplitEase is a modern, user-friendly web application designed to simplify expense tracking and bill splitting among friends, roommates, and travelers. Built with a focus on seamless user experience and real-time collaboration, SplitEase eliminates the hassle of manually calculating shared costs.

projects.title: Medica
projects.description: Medica is a modern, full-stack e-commerce web application designed for purchasing over-the-counter (OTC) medicines.

projects.title: Recipo
projects.description: Recipo is a modern, user-friendly AI Featured web application designed to simplify expense tracking and bill splitting among friends, roommates, and travelers. Built with a focus on seamless user experience and real-time collaboration, SplitEase eliminates the hassle of manually calculating shared costs.

projects.title: All-in-One Business Solution
projects.description: The aim of this web application is to deliver a complete ERP solution to businesses of all sizes, allowing them to simplify activity, improve efficiency, and increase productivity.

projects.title: Collaborative Task Management System
projects.description: This web-based Collaborative Task Management System streamlines project management and enhances teamwork. With roles for Admin, Developer, Client, and Manager, it enables efficient collaboration and task handling. Built with PHP and JavaScript.

projects.title: Dealora (E-Commerce Platform)
projects.description: The aim of this project is to build a scalable and secure B2C marketplace using ASP.NET, enabling businesses to list products and consumers to easily browse, purchase, and track orders with integrated payment solutions.
